subject: fix(review): comprehensive codebase review fixes and documentation sync
body:
Bug fixes:
- BottomSheet: reactive dimensions via useWindowDimensions (was static at
  module load, broke on orientation/resize/keyboard)
- BottomSheet: flick gesture edge case — closest-match index instead of
  exact indexOf (returned -1 after interrupted animations)
- BottomSheet: animation cleanup on unmount (stop active Animated.spring)
- BottomSheet: accessibility — adjustable role, label, hint, and
  increment/decrement actions for screen readers
- LocationSearch: response.ok check, AbortController 8s timeout, and
  user-visible error feedback (was silently swallowing failures)
- usePWAUpdate: waitForInstalled statechange listener leak fixed
- TutorialModal: step 4 replaced stale map/list toggle reference with
  bottom sheet description

Code quality:
- Removed unused LightTheme imports from +html.tsx and DebugPill.tsx
- Memoized renderStation in admin/index.tsx with useCallback
- Added Alternatives sections to 15 non-compliant file headers (all
  non-trivial files now have What/Why/Alternatives per CLAUDE.md)

Documentation sync:
- CLAUDE.md: updated Project Status and Architecture for bottom sheet
- USER_GUIDE.md: full rewrite covering all implemented features
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: 43 UI test scenarios added
- TODO.md: moved completed items to HISTORY, removed stale entries
- HISTORY.md: added missing entries for 3+ sessions of work
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten for current session
- README.md: updated status description

Tags: review, bugfix, accessibility, documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch

title: comprehensive codebase review fixes and documentation sync
